items.title: Here’s how to time your retirement to keep your healthcare costs down
items.description: Plus, more ways to lower how much you pay out of pocket for medical care in retirement.

items.title: An oil lifeline is under threat, and markets have yet to price in the growing crisis
items.description: The Houthis escalated threats on Tuesday, risking millions of barrels of Saudi oil that had been reaching energy markets despite the U.S.-Iran war.

items.title: SpaceX’s stock looks to snap brutal losing streak as it heads for one of its best days yet
items.description: Plus, investors just found out when insiders can start dumping their shares.

items.title: Microsoft has 3 secret weapons that could drive its stock 50% higher, analyst says
items.description: Wall Street is misjudging Microsoft’s AI strategy, according to Morgan Stanley.

items.title: These signs suggest investors should give the software sector a second chance
items.description: Software stocks and loans have started to find their footing in July, suggesting it may be time for investors to forgive and forget.

items.title: Pro stock pickers cannot beat simple math — war in the Middle East is proving it
items.description: Active stock pickers almost always lose against the broad market. They can’t beat simple math.

items.title: Novo Nordisk’s lawsuit against Eli Lilly over ads highlights intense competition in GLP-1 market
items.description: The Danish company Novo Nordisk says U.S.-based Lilly isn’t including the most up-to-date clinical information about its drugs.

items.title: Think this stock market is in a bubble? These earnings numbers say otherwise.
items.description: Stay with the AI trade and overweight technology stocks, according to one earnings expert.

items.title: Why Paramount could win if it loses the Warner Bros. Discovery deal
items.description: States are trying to block Paramount’s mega-merger. Shareholders should root for them.

items.title: Tesla earnings are on deck, and investors will be looking to settle this major debate
items.description: Wall Street wants to see whether Tesla can deliver on its robotaxi and Optimus plans.
